title: Bridge Essay: Interoceptive awareness in experienced meditators.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Heat/Fire** (Phase 3) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Heat/Fire to mechanistic neuroscience through Interoceptive, awareness, in, experienced, meditators..

**Interoceptive awareness in experienced meditators.** — Psychophysiology. PMID: 18503485. DOI: 10.1111/j.1469-8986.2008.00666.x. Attention to internal body sensations is practiced in most meditation traditions. Many traditions state that this practice results in increased awareness of internal body sensations, but scientific studies evaluating this claim are lacking. We predicted that experienced meditators would display performance superior to that of nonmeditators on heartbeat detection, astandard noninvasive measure of resting interoceptive awareness.
